step_rationale: Mitochondrial β-oxidation enzyme; energy metabolism in cardiomyocytes; dysfunction links to MI injury.
mechanism: ECI2 deficiency impairs mitochondrial fatty-acid oxidation, reducing ATP production and increasing cardiomyocyte vulnerability to ischemic injury.

references.title: Transcriptomic and single-cell insights into mitochondrial genes NDUFA8, ECI2, and ACADM in acute myocardial infarction.
